ddls:
CREATE TABLE "lottery_games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lottery game */,
  "game_name" TEXT /* Name of the lottery game */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the lottery game */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the lottery game is played */,
  "game_description_url" TEXT /* URL linking to a detailed description of the game rules and regulations */,
  "game_min_age" INTEGER /* Minimum age required to participate in the game */,
  "game_max_tickets_per_customer" INTEGER /* Maximum number of tickets a customer can purchase for the game */,
  "game_operators" TEXT /* List of operators or retailers authorized to sell tickets for the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lottery_games_country FOREIGN KEY ("country") REFERENCES countries ("country_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "prize_tiers" (
  "tier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prize tier */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lottery game the tier belongs to */,
  "tier_name" TEXT /* Name of the prize tier */,
  "prize_per_winner" TEXT /* Prize amount for each winner in this tier */,
  "tier_min_numbers_matched" INTEGER /* Minimum numbers a player must match to qualify for this tier */,
  "tier_max_numbers_matched" INTEGER /* Maximum numbers a player can match to qualify for this tier */,
  "tier_odds" TEXT /* Odds of winning this tier */,
  "tier_prize_fund_percentage" TEXT /* Percentage of the total prize fund allocated to this tier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prize_tiers_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES lottery_games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "winners" (
  "winner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each winner record */,
  "tier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prize tier the winners belong to */,
  "num_winners" INTEGER /* Total number of winners in this tier */,
  "estonian_winners" INTEGER /* Number of Estonian winners in this tier */,
  "winner_ticket_id" INTEGER /* ID of the winning ticket */,
  "winner_prize_claim_date" TEXT /* Date the winner claimed their prize */,
  "winner_prize_claim_status" TEXT /* Status of the prize claim */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("winner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_winners_tier_id FOREIGN KEY ("tier_id") REFERENCES prize_tiers ("tier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prize_funds" (
  "fund_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prize fund record */,
  "tier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prize tier the fund belongs to */,
  "prize_fund_amount" TEXT /* Total amount of the prize fund for this tier */,
  "fund_type" TEXT /* Type of prize fund */,
  "fund_allocation_percentage" TEXT /* Percentage of the total prize fund allocated to this tier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fund_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prize_funds_tier_id FOREIGN KEY ("tier_id") REFERENCES prize_tiers ("tier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the country */,
  "country_tax_rate" TEXT /* Tax rate applied to lottery winnings in this country */,
  "country_currency_symbol" TEXT /* Currency symbol used in this country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tickets" (
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lottery ticket */,
  "draw_id" INTEGER /* ID of the draw the ticket belongs to */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who purchased the ticket */,
  "numbers_matched" TEXT /* Numbers matched on the ticket */,
  "tier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prize tier the ticket belongs to */,
  "ticket_price" TEXT /* Price of the ticket */,
  "ticket_purchase_date" TEXT /* Date the ticket was purchased */,
  "ticket_purchase_time" TEXT /* Time the ticket was purchased */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ticket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_tier_id FOREIGN KEY ("tier_id") REFERENCES prize_tiers ("tier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the customer belongs to */,
  "customer_registration_date" TEXT /* Date the customer registered for the lottery */,
  "customer_account_status" TEXT /* Status of the customer's account */,
  "customer_email_verification_status" TEXT /* Status of the customer's email verification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payouts" (
  "payout_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payout record */,
  "winner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the winner the payout belongs to */,
  "amount_paid" TEXT /* Amount paid to the winner */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date when the payment was made */,
  "payout_method" TEXT /* Method used to make the payout */,
  "payout_processing_date" TEXT /* Date the payout was processed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payout_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payouts_winner_id FOREIGN KEY ("winner_id") REFERENCES winners ("winner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic record */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lottery game the statistic belongs to */,
  "statistic_name" TEXT /* Name of the statistic */,
  "statistic_value" TEXT /* Value of the statistic */,
  "statistic_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the statistic was last updated */,
  "statistic_data_source" TEXT /* Source of the statistic data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistics_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES lottery_games ("game_id")
)
